name: github
description: GitHub integration — triage PRs, issues, and CI via the official GitHub MCP, with gh/git for the gaps, plus GitHub's official skills.

interface.shortDescription: Triage PRs, issues & CI, with official skills
interface.longDescription: Connect the official GitHub MCP to triage pull requests, issues, and CI from UniAI, falling back to gh/git for what the MCP doesn't cover. Authenticate with a Personal Access Token. Bundled with GitHub's official skills (review comments, CI fixes, PR creation). Runtime needs gh, git, and python3.
